legs.label: Prepare the Stage-2 agenda
legs.description: Project the EL2 threads into a stable agenda for Raven.
legs.lead: AX turns threads.json into the agenda the walk will exhaust.
beats: Reads threads.json from the bundle.
Writes runtime/front-of-house/agenda.json with stable item ids.
Stages the first item for Raven without asking the director at launch.

legs.label: Stage the next unresolved agenda item
legs.description: Pick the next agenda item not yet answered or residualed and write it for Raven.
legs.lead: AX walks the agenda in order, skipping items already answered or carried as residual.
beats: Reads the agenda and this run's answer and residual Ledger events.
Writes the next unresolved item to current-item.json, current-item.md, and for-raven.md.
Reports AGENDA_DONE once every item is answered or residualed.

legs.label: Review the current Front-of-House turn through Raven
legs.description: On the first frame-origin wake, Raven opens with the product headline map plus search-frame confirmation; later wakes mediate one agenda item.
legs.lead: The run waits; Raven turns the staged artifact into a director-facing comprehension check.
beats: Raven banks the staged turn as an agent Ledger event before speaking.
For the frame-origin first wake, Raven presents the Product Containers headline as thesis, major pieces, drift, and search-frame confirmation.
For later wakes, Raven mediates the current item and evidence refs at section/shape altitude.
The director's agreed answer returns through ax raven answer and is banked as actor.kind=user.

legs.label: Plan the director-backed bundle patch
legs.description: Convert the director answer into a narrow patch file that AX can validate.
legs.lead: The agent drafts structure changes only; AX owns the actual write.
beats: Reads the answer receipt and current agenda item.
Drafts a patch that cites the user answer event id.
Limits edits to names, context, plane, status, and relationships.

legs.label: Validate or reject the bundle patch
legs.description: Classify the planned patch as applied or rejected, appending accepted patches to the draft log when one is bound.
legs.lead: AX enforces provenance and the Small-floor frontmatter boundary, then emits a routing marker.
beats: Rejects patches without a matching actor.kind=user answer event.
Preserves card bodies and required Small-floor fields.
Appends accepted patches to the draft log when bound, otherwise mutates bundle cards.
Appends a bundle_patch_applied event for accepted patches or writes a patch-rejection diagnostic.

legs.label: Replan the rejected bundle patch once
legs.description: Give the agent one repair turn with AX's exact validation error.
legs.lead: The agent corrects the patch, not the director answer.
beats: Reads runtime/front-of-house/patch-rejection.json.
Uses the exact validation error as the repair target.
Writes a replacement patch for the same agenda item and answer event.

legs.label: Validate or reject the replanned bundle patch
legs.description: Append or apply the repaired patch, or classify the second rejection.
legs.lead: A second patch rejection no longer strands the rest of the agenda.
beats: Appends valid repaired patches to the draft log when bound, otherwise applies them to bundle cards.
Writes a fresh patch-rejection diagnostic for invalid repaired patches.
Routes second rejection to residual accounting instead of another replan.

legs.label: Record rejected patch as residual
legs.description: Carry an item whose patch failed twice into the existing residual-gap path.
legs.lead: The walk keeps moving while preserving the failed validation reason.
beats: Reads the current item and patch-rejection diagnostic.
Appends library.front_of_house.residual_gap_recorded with a patch rejected reason.
Allows stage-next to continue to later agenda items.

legs.label: Finalize residual-gap accounting
legs.description: Write RESIDUAL-GAPS.md for every agenda item not answered or explicitly residualed.
legs.lead: Nothing disappears: every unanswered item is carried forward.
beats: Compares the full agenda with answer and residual Ledger events.
Appends residual_gap_recorded events for unanswered items.
Writes RESIDUAL-GAPS.md.
